englishDefinitions: A phrase meaning life is unpredictable and full of surprises; you cannot know what will happen next.
persianTranslation: جعبه شکلات (استعاره از غیرقابل‌پیش‌بینی بودن زندگی)
examples: Starting a new job is like a box of chocolates — you never know what challenges will come your way.
Traveling to a new country is a box of chocolates; every day brings a different surprise.
Relationships can be like a box of chocolates, full of unexpected moments.
